CREATE TABLE hexagon_data (id UInt32, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(0) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution = 0;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(15) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution = 15;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution IN (0, 15);
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution > 5 AND resolution < 10;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(15) AS edgeLengthM, id FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution = 15 ORDER BY id;
SELECT AVG(h3EdgeLengthM(resolution)) AS avgEdgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data;
WITH (SELECT MAX(resolution) FROM hexagon_data) AS max_res FROM hexagon_data SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(max_res) AS edgeLengthM;
SELECT DISTINCT id, h3EdgeLengthM(1) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
SELECT id, h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM hexagon_data WHERE resolution > 5) ORDER BY edgeLengthM DESC;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) AS edgeLengthM FROM hexagon_data HAVING edgeLengthM > 10;
CREATE TABLE hexagon_resolution AS SELECT resolution FROM hexagon_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(resolution) FROM hexagon_resolution JOIN hexagon_data ON hexagon_resolution.resolution = hexagon_data.resolution;
